patch.value:
## Narrative
An agent (or a different agent under the same mission) returns to a workspace after a gap — an hour, a week, or a year. Today it must re-derive state: list open items, read bodies, replay comments, and hope its predecessor recorded enough. The continuity experience this story demands: one bounded-token call restores the working set (what was in progress and why), the distilled knowledge relevant to it (learnings/decisions), and a delta of what changed during the gap — regardless of gap length or workspace size.

## Acceptance narrative (end-to-end over the composed context engine)
- Short gap (same day): pm context reflects the last focus/claim state and recent activity with no configuration.
- Medium gap (weeks): the working set is re-ranked for what is still live; superseded work is not resurfaced; relevant learnings recorded meanwhile are surfaced.
- Long gap (a year+, consolidated epochs per pm-5qmm): the gap period contributes rollup summaries, not raw items; token cost stays bounded and proportional to what is actionable now, not to elapsed time.
- "While you were away": the delta view is derivable from history/event primitives (pm-e200 cursor semantics) rather than manual list-diffing.
- Works identically from CLI, MCP, and SDK; measurable via pm-atfm continuity scenario classes.

## Boundaries
- Not a session daemon: everything derives from recorded tracker state (ADR pm-i7i4 no-daemon constraint).
- Complements, not duplicates: pm-g2zz (scale end), pm-z436 (small end) cover workspace size; this story covers the time dimension.

As a long-lived agent returning to a workspace after an hour or a year, pm context restores my working memory — active work, why it matters, distilled learnings, and what changed while I was away — in bounded tokens

Time-dimension continuity story completing the spectrum trio: pm-g2zz covers workspace scale, pm-z436 the small end, this covers gap length. End-to-end acceptance narrative for the composed context engine (ADR pm-vvib). Dedupe-checked: no existing resumption/continuity story.

Continuity scenarios (short/medium/long gap incl. consolidated epochs) are expressible and pass as pm-atfm judgment classes; a returning agent needs exactly one documented context call; token cost is bounded by actionable-now content, not elapsed time; delta-since-cursor is derivable from history/event primitives without manual diffing

author: codex-root
